steps.title: Find the radius value
steps.content:
The height, radius, and segment $AB$ form a right triangle. Use the Pythagorean theorem:
$$r^2=84^2-42^2=7{,}056-1{,}764=5{,}292$$

steps.title: Use cone volume
steps.content:
The volume of a cone is:
$$V=\frac{1}{3}\pi r^2h$$
Substitute $r^2=5{,}292$ and $h=42$:
$$V=\frac{1}{3}\pi(5{,}292)(42)$$

steps.title: Compute k
steps.content:
Evaluate the coefficient of $\pi$:
$$\frac{1}{3}(5{,}292)(42)=1{,}764(42)=74{,}088$$
The answer is 74088.
